full_text:
S290 pOme

Sample was dissociated in 25 ml of AdF++ containing Dispase and DNase according to the protocol.

Final pellet was resuspended in 3 ml of the culture medium

Cell count /ml

1). Total cells: 3.25x 106 /mL

Live cells: 2.28 x 106 /mL

Viability: 70%

Average size: 6.8 um

2). Total cells: 3.36x 106 /mL

Live cells: 3.01 x 106 /mL

Viability: 89 %

Average size: 8.6 um

Average of two counts: 3.3 x 106 /mL

Total cell count: 9.9 x 106 /3ml

Pellet looked bigger and appear to contain more cells than 6 E6. When checked under microscope there were lot of tumor cell aggregates/clumps which may have under estimated cell count

A) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

55 wells x 40 µl = 2200 µl,

500 cells/µl = 2.2*E6 cells

Divide them into two tubes of 1100 ul

→ take 100 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 1.1*E6 cells into two tubes, proceed with the omentum gel mix as below.

→ make 1100 ul of omentum gel mix in 1.5ml eppendorf

cells → 166 ul

culture medium→ 748 ul

ome-gel → 157 µl

aprotinin → 3.7 µl

thrombin → 3.3 µl

Fibrinogen → 22 ul

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL organoid culture medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 50 uL to make up to 350 uL per well

Left over omentum gel mix from 384 well plate was plated into 18 wells (40ul each) as control for scRNA seq

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

384 wells x 20 µl = 7680 µl

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells

prepare the mix for 384 wells 1000 cells/µl = 7.7E6 cells

→ make 4 x of 920 µl omegel plus cells mixture in a tube and 1000 ul medium in a reservoir

→ 500 cells/µl = 3.8 E6

volume to take from cell suspension: 288 µl

ORG full medium → 477.6 µl

ome-gel → 130 µl

aprotinin → 3.0 µl

thrombin → 3.0 µl

fibrinogen → 18.4 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

E) Sample for flow

→ Collect 0.5. e6 cells for flow cytometry for unstained control and antibody stain for functional marker analysis in immune cells

F) Remaining cells were frozen in stem cell banker as 2 E6 *1 vials

FACS staining was performed for d0 pOme samples according to the protocol with overnight storing of cell pellet in FACS staining buffer after primary ab staining followed by fixation and permeabilization. In addition, d0 unstained cells of the same samples as well as new compensation was run at the same time.

Treatment was initiated on day 1.

For 384 well plate drug dispensing was done using Tecan

Drug treatment conditions for 48 well plate:

control

olaparib 20uM

olaparib 40uM

pembro 10ug/mL

pembro 50ug/mL

GSK STING agonist 0.01uM

GSK STING agonist 0.25uM

GSK STING agonist 0.1uM

GSK STING agonist 1uM

Treatment plan:

Required volume of the 7x concentrated drug→

50 ul /well *6 for 48 wells + 25 ul / well*6 for 96 wells = 300 uL + 150 uL =450 uLà prepare 500 ul

Add 50 uL of 7x concentrated drug or DMSO to each of the 48 wells

Add 25uL of 7x concentrated drug or DMSO to each of the 96 wells

Dilute 1mM stock STING agonist to 0.1mM (100uM) in DMSO > 1ul of stock + 9 ul of DMSO

Fixation Of the cells from 384w plate and processing of cells from 48w for FACS and scRNAseq was done on day 5 (day 4 of drug treatment)

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Compound | [Stock] | Location of the stock | [working] | 7x concentrated | Required volume of the 7x concentrated drug per 500 uL | Volume of the culture medium
DMSO (control) | 100 % | RT, lab | 0.2 % | 1.4 % | 7uL | 493 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 7 uL | 493 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 40 uM | 280 ug / mL | 14 uL | 486 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 7 uL | 493 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 50 ug / mL | 350 ug/ ml | 35 uL | 465 uL
 | | | | | | 
STING agonist | 0.1 mM | -80 C | 0.01 uM | 0.07 uM | 0.35 uL | 499.6
STING agonist | 0.1 mM | -80 C | 0.025 uM | 0.175 uM | 0.87 uL | 499.1
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 0.1 uM | 0.7 uM | 0.35 uL | 499.6 uL
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 1 uM | 7 uM | 3.5 uL | 496.5
